summary: OSV reports vulnerabilities for this package version. deps.dev advisory details are available.

sql.osv: SELECT id, summary, severity, references FROM osv.query_by_version WHERE package_name = 'minimist' AND ecosystem = 'npm' AND version = '0.0.8' LIMIT 20
sql.deps_dev_version: SELECT version, published_at, licenses, advisory_keys, related_projects, links FROM deps_dev.versions WHERE system = 'NPM' AND package_name = 'minimist' AND version = '0.0.8' LIMIT 1
sql.deps_dev_dependencies: SELECT dependency_name, dependency_version, relation FROM deps_dev.dependencies WHERE system = 'NPM' AND package_name = 'minimist' AND version = '0.0.8' LIMIT 20
sql.deps_dev_advisories: SELECT advisory_id, title, advisory_url, cvss3_score, aliases FROM deps_dev.advisories WHERE advisory_id IN ('GHSA-vh95-rmgr-6w4m') LIMIT 20

steps.name: deps_dev_package_version
steps.sql: SELECT version, published_at, licenses, advisory_keys, related_projects, links FROM deps_dev.versions WHERE system = 'NPM' AND package_name = 'minimist' AND version = '0.0.8' LIMIT 1

steps.name: deps_dev_dependencies
steps.sql: SELECT dependency_name, dependency_version, relation FROM deps_dev.dependencies WHERE system = 'NPM' AND package_name = 'minimist' AND version = '0.0.8' LIMIT 20

steps.name: deps_dev_advisories
steps.sql: SELECT advisory_id, title, advisory_url, cvss3_score, aliases FROM deps_dev.advisories WHERE advisory_id IN ('GHSA-vh95-rmgr-6w4m') LIMIT 20

steps.name: osv_package_vulnerabilities
steps.sql: SELECT id, summary, severity, references FROM osv.query_by_version WHERE package_name = 'minimist' AND ecosystem = 'npm' AND version = '0.0.8' LIMIT 20
